Title: Osney Bridge diversion Oxford
Description: Towpath closed 150 yards upstream from bridge, diversion via Abbey Road and Botley Road

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure Henley
Description: Footbridge closed for safety reasons, 2.7 mile diversion via Mill Lane and Harpsden

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge north of Sandford Lock closed, diversion via NCN 5

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway intermittent closure
Description: Walkway closed due to corrosion when river levels high, re-routed via town centre, intermittently accessible

Title: Temple Footbridge closure Marlow
Description: Closed May 2023 due to structural damage, central span removed Nov 2025, unlikely to reopen until 2028 at earliest, divert via Marlow Bridge

Title: Bridge 142 closure Runnymede Egham
Description: Cast iron bridge closed Feb 2024 due to tree strike and cracks, diversion via A308, expected until 2027

Title: Bell Weir Lock refurbishment Runnymede
Description: Temporary diversion around construction compound for £22m weir refurbishment, works spring 2026 to autumn 2027

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Half mile diversion due to eroding towpath, reopening unlikely until late 2026

Title: Penton Hook Island closure
Description: Island closed to public due to diseased trees (ash dieback), Thames Path unaffected but island inaccessible

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure Faringdon
Description: Bridge between Rushey and Shifford locks closed March 2024 for structural safety concerns

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank of Grand Union Canal, partial reopening with partial route available, redevelopment ongoing
